ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the country is located */,
  "income_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the income group of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code for the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Name of the capital city */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language(s) of the country */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_income_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("income_group_id") REFERENCES income_groups ("income_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Latin America & Caribbean, South Asia) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Total area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_groups" (
  "income_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income group */,
  "income_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the income group (e.g., High income: nonOECD, Low income) */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* Average GDP per capita for the income group */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of countries in the income group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the income group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "life_expectancy" (
  "le_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each life expectancy record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the life expectancy is recorded */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy value in years */,
  "male_life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy for males */,
  "female_life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy for females */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the life expectancy data (e.g., WHO, UN) */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("le_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_life_expectancy_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health indicator record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the indicator is recorded */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the health indicator (e.g., infant mortality rate, vaccination rate) */,
  "indicator_value" REAL /* Value of the health indicator */,
  "male_indicator_value" REAL /* Indicator value for males */,
  "female_indicator_value" REAL /* Indicator value for females */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the health indicator data (e.g., WHO, CDC) */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the health indicator data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the indicator is recorded */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator (e.g., GDP per capita, unemployment rate) */,
  "indicator_value" REAL /* Value of the economic indicator */,
  "male_indicator_value" REAL /* Indicator value for males (if applicable) */,
  "female_indicator_value" REAL /* Indicator value for females (if applicable) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the economic indicator data (e.g., World Bank, IMF) */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the economic indicator data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, policymaker) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, government agency) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed (can refer to life expectancy, health indicators, or economic indicators) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client making the request */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data accessed (e.g., life_expectancy, health_indicators, economic_indicators) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES health_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES life_expectancy ("le_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being validated (can refer to life expectancy, health indicators, or economic indicators) */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the validation rule (e.g., non-negative values, range check) */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the validation rule */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the validation (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the validation was performed */,
  "validated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the validation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the validation */,
  "validation_type" TEXT /* Type of validation (e.g., automated, manual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_validated_by FOREIGN KEY ("validated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES life_expectancy ("le_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES health_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being versioned (can refer to life expectancy, health indicators, or economic indicators) */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the version */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was reviewed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, reviewed, approved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES health_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES life_expectancy ("le_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id")
)
